name: Winvest Group Ltd
summary: Winvest Group Ltd (WNLV) is a Nevada corporation operating through wholly owned subsidiaries: The Catalyst Group Entertainment (TCG), a Beverly Hills-based film finance and production company seeking $6M-$24M to invest in global film, TV, and media projects; IQI Media, Inc., a California media company; and Billie Black Production LLC. TCG focuses on pre-sale distribution, tax incentive financing, and gap/mezzanine financing for film and entertainment projects.
